notes:
Space Commander War and Trade flashes a black window that is afterwards closed showing the previous screen and only plays the sound. I've never seen the main menu either and I also tried different compatibility settings different from default (some Proton versions (Experimental, 7.0-4, 6.3-8, 5.13-6) do not start any window or sound at all, some Proton versions (5.0-10, 4.11-13, 4.2-9, 3.16-9, 3.7-8) start a window instead of full screen black flashing, Steam Linux Runtime starts with the same flashed black window that closes as the default and I can only hear the sound.

Note: There might be several issues with my setup, one of the warnings shown in console being 'Xlib:  extension "RANDR" missing on display ":99.0".' even though my real display number is :0.

To sum it up, I am missing the RANDR extension for my setup and the game might be opening in a different weird display number that I don't really see, :99.0 instead of :0 as usual. I also tried going to all the front-end displays using CTRL+ALT+F7, F8, F9, ..., F12.
Game works very nice when Xinerama is not enabled in xorg.conf for using multiple monitors
Setting up default xorg.conf and running xrandr allows multiple monitors and gaming
